overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female warrior with white hair walking through a snowy rural landscape at night. The character travels along a winding path bordered by stone walls and cypress trees, approaching a large wooden gate structure where another figure awaits.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy rural path between stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered path through the open countryside, weapon sheathed on back

entered.detail: gnarled leafless tree with twisted branches silhouetted against the sky
low stacked stone wall running along the left side of the path
low stacked stone wall running along the right side of the path
tall narrow dark cypress trees lining the winding path ahead
distant mountain range covered in snow visible under the cloudy night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a desolate snow-covered rural path bordered by low stone walls. Tall cypress trees line the route ahead while snow-capped mountains loom in the distance under an overcast night sky. The landscape is empty and quiet, with dead trees and sparse vegetation visible in the fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching traditional gate at village entrance

events.description: a hooded figure holding a red torch becomes visible standing near the gate structure ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the large gate structure, approaching the figure with the red light

notable_agents.action: hooded figure standing near the wooden gate holding a red torch or lantern

entered.detail: large traditional wooden gate with stone pillars marking the entrance to the village area
distant ruined stone buildings and structures partially covered in snow

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the winding path, a large wooden gate structure comes into view ahead. The stone walls continue alongside the path while ruined buildings appear on the right side. Near the gate, a hooded figure holding a red torch stands waiting, becoming visible as the character approaches the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate snowy path that gradually leads toward a guarded wooden gateway. It begins with the character walking steadily through a quiet rural landscape, bordered by low stone walls and tall cypress trees under an overcast night sky with distant snow-capped mountains. As the character continues along the winding route, the empty fields give way to ruined buildings appearing on the right. The scene then opens up to reveal a large wooden gate structure ahead, where a hooded figure holding a red torch becomes visible. The camera finally closes the distance, moving from the isolation of the frozen wilderness toward the flickering light of the waiting sentinel.
